settings.heading: WHEN WILL MY ORDER SHIP?
settings.content: Date of purchase + production time(business days) = ship date

settings.heading: WHAT IS THE CONTENT OF YOUR DOWN/FEATHER INSERTS?
settings.content: The content of our pillow inserts are 95/5 feather/down.

settings.heading: AM I ABLE TO PURCHASE INSERTS FROM YOU WITHOUT ORDERING PILLOW COVERS?
settings.content: No, our inserts are sold solely to customers who purchase covers from our online and/or Etsy store so that they may complete their purchase.

settings.heading: WHERE CAN I FIND CARE INSTRUCTIONS?
settings.content: Please see individual product listing for specific care instructions.

settings.heading: DO YOU TAKE CUSTOM ORDERS?
settings.content: Yes, please email custom@shoplittledesignco.com with details and our team will get back with you asap!

settings.heading: DO YOU TAKE COM (CUSTOMERS OWN MATERIAL) ORDERS?
settings.content: Yes, for all COM orders please email custom@shoplittledesignco.com and we will send you our COM guide and information regarding our process.

settings.heading: WHAT DOES PRE-ORDER MEAN?
settings.content: Pre-Order means the fabric is not currently in stock but more yardage has been ordered and will be available again at a later date.

settings.heading: WHAT DOES LOW STOCK MEAN?
settings.content: Low Stock means we have limited yardage in stock. You are still able to place orders however we may reach out if your order is unable to be fulfilled.

settings.heading: WHAT INSERT SIZE DO I NEED?
settings.content:
It is our standard that pillow inserts are to be 2-4 inches larger than the pillow cover, this creates a more full look and gives you the perfect pillow chop. Please see our size chart below for recommended insert sizing ::

Lumbar Pillows ::

12” X 16” cover // 14” X 20” insert

12” X 18” cover // 14” X 20” insert

12” X 18” cover // 14” X 20” insert

14” X 24” cover // 16” X 26” insert

14” X 30” cover // 16” X 32” insert

14” X 36” cover || 16” X 38” insert 

14” X 48” cover // 16” X 50” insert

15” X 22” cover // 17” X 24” insert

20" X 26" cover // 22" X 28" insert

20" X 30" cover // 22" X 32" insert

20" X 36" cover // 22" X 38 insert  

Square Pillows :: 

18” X 18” cover // 20” X 20” insert

20” X 20” cover // 22” X 22” insert

22” X 22” cover // 24” X 24” insert

24” X 24” cover // 27” X 27” insert

26” X 26” cover // 30” X 30” insert

settings.heading: DO YOU EVER OFFER DISCOUNTS OR SALES?
settings.content: Stay up to date by subscribing to our email list and following us on instagram @littledesignco for the latest news, sales, and updates!

settings.heading: Subscribe to our newsletter
settings.subheading: Signup for our newsletter to stay up to date on sales and events.
